assessment.note: She names a specific clarity gap in fast cross-team conversations: leaving unsure who committed to what.

new_queue.label: Committed to what
new_queue.name: When that happens, what part gets lost — owners, decisions, or next steps?
new_queue.description: Drills into the exact ambiguity in cross-team meetings so the manager can tighten operating rules.

new_queue.label: Alignment friction
new_queue.name: What part of running alignment is taking more effort than it should?
new_queue.description: Identifies where she is over-investing in consensus or decoding norms.

new_queue.label: Support from me
new_queue.name: Where would a clearer call from me help you most?
new_queue.description: Makes room for concrete manager support on boundaries and escalation.

new_queue.label: Next support
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Ends on practical next steps and support needed to make onboarding smoother.
